entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 50S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A 30 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
